CREATE TABLE region_data (id UInt32, area_id UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT regionToArea(toUInt32(5), 'ua') AS area FROM system.numbers LIMIT 15;
SELECT DISTINCT regionToName(regionToArea(toUInt32(id), 'ua')) FROM region_data WHERE area_id > 0;
SELECT r.id, regionToArea(toUInt32(r.id), 'ua') AS area_id FROM region_data r JOIN region_data a ON r.area_id = a.id;
SELECT regionToArea(id) FROM region_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM region_data WHERE area_id = 20);
WITH (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM region_data) AS ids SELECT regionToArea(toUInt32(ids)) FROM region_data;
WITH (SELECT MIN(id) FROM region_data) AS min_id SELECT regionToArea(toUInt32(min_id)) FROM region_data;
SELECT regionToArea(1), regionToArea(2), regionToArea(3), regionToArea(4) FROM region_data;
CREATE TABLE area_lookup (region_id UInt32, area_name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY region_id;
INSERT INTO area_lookup VALUES (10, 'Area A'), (20, 'Area B'), (30, 'Area C');
SELECT a.area_name FROM area_lookup a JOIN region_data r ON a.region_id = regionToArea(r.id) WHERE r.area_id > 0;
SELECT regionToArea(id, 'ua') AS area, COUNT(*) FROM region_data GROUP BY area;
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN regionToArea(id) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM region_data;
